The AI Parsing Engine

Watch raw text become structured data in under two seconds.

Our AI parsing engine reads free-form WhatsApp broadcasts and extracts typed fields — category, locality, area, price, floor, availability — with a live confidence score for every value.

whatsapp_broadcast.raw
Input
📢 Available for immediate lease:
Premium Commercial Bar & Restaurant space
📍 Location: Worli, Mumbai
📐 5065 sqft carpet area, ground floor
💰 Expected rent 16.46 Lakhs / month
✅ Fully licensed. Contact for site visit.
